label: 第134話
source_locator: 単行本16巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 京都校の術師たちが参戦する。脹相は夏油の肉体を操る人物を自分たち九相図の誕生に関わった加茂憲倫だと見抜き、敵対する。
summary_full: 羂索は呪霊操術の極ノ番「うずまき」について、準一級以上の呪霊を使用すると、その呪霊が持つ術式を抽出できると説明し、真人を取り込む。京都校の術師たちは遠距離攻撃を仕掛け、三輪は今後刀を振るえなくてもよいという縛りを込めて抜刀するが、羂索に刀を折られる。羂索のうずまきは日下部が割って入り三輪を救う。到着した脹相は、夏油の肉体を操る人物を九相図誕生に関わった加茂憲倫だと見抜き、虎杖の兄として敵対する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Pseudo-夏油 continues his conversation with 悠仁 about all the techniques he's acquired. The 呪詛師 is interrupted by the timely arrival of the Kyoto 呪術高専 students. As more people gather for the final clash of the 渋谷事変 , 脹相 appears and unveils a shocking revelation about the man controlling 夏油傑 's body.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " The technique is... extracted. " Standing before 悠仁 holding 真人 's sealed inside a black orb in his hand, Pseudo-夏油 begins to explain 極ノ番 術式. They are an innate technique 's most powerful art outside of 領域展開 . 呪霊操術 極ノ番: うずまき combines 呪霊 in the user's possession to unleash a burst of super condensed 呪力 . In the middle of his explanation, 夏油 strangely begins to laugh. 悠仁 asks what's so funny and the 呪詛師 replies that he accidentally started acting like 傑. Continuing on about うずまき, he explains the technique is powerful but he initially believed it negated the great number of moves at the curse manipulator's disposal. For now, 悠仁 decides to quietly listen and wait the moment out. Pseudo-夏油 admits he was wrong about うずまき because when semi-grade 1 and higher 呪霊 are utilized, their 術式 is extracted. The Kyoto students launch their counterattack! 夏油 swallows the black orb containing 真人, officially adding the special grade to his collection. While looking up, 夏油 tells 悠仁 it's foolish to think he wouldn't notice something the first-year already had. 西宮桃 is floating above him on her broom, using a lantern as a signal for her allies to attack from long range. 加茂憲紀 is the first to act, firing 呪力 infused arrows at the enemy. 夏油 avoids the arrows but immediately notices a speeding bullet coming directly at him. While a 呪霊 to block the bullet, 夏油 commends 真依. He likes that she used a sniper rifle because it's wise to use conventional weaponry against human sorcerers . As 三輪霞 joins the fight, she recalls her past. Her mother used to dye her hair black when she was captain of the youth basketball team. She met her mentor in Junior High and decided to become a jujutsu sorcerer despite having never even held a wooden sword. 三輪 always held onto her katana tight to provide for her family as well as keeping herself alive. 三輪 slides behind 夏油 and activates 新陰流 Style. While recalling her blistered and bloodied hands, 三輪 puts everything into this swing. She's prepared to never use a sword again and attacks with 抜刀 . However, 夏油 catches the blade with his bare hands and shatters it. 極ノ番: うずまき! Immediately after negating 三輪's attack, 夏油 activates 極ノ番: うずまき. With the technique having been divulged to him, 悠仁 knows うずまき's power and yells for the 呪詛師 to stop. 桃 also looks down and moves to save 三輪, but someone else gets there first. うずまき destroys the ground with a blast of super-condensed 呪力, leaving a gaping fissure in the ground from the impact. However, the technique didn't hit anyone and 夏油 admits its nice facing someone with experience rather than these students. 日下部 was able to use his 新陰流 Style to cancel out part of the 術式 and protect 三輪. 桃 and 歌姫 are behind him with 三輪 as well. They're arguing about being out front in the battle but felt they had no choice with the danger presented. 脹相 recognizes the man controlling 夏油's body as his own creator. At the same time, パンダ arrives to the battlefield and checks on 悠仁. He's relieved to see that 悠仁 is back in control of his body. He asks if the 呪詛師 has the 呪物 holding 五条悟 , which Noritoshi believes is likely the case. Noritoshi asks who the 呪詛師 is and パンダ can only say that it's a mystery person that has assumed the identity of 夏油傑 by controlling his body. Suddenly, 脹相 also arrives on the battlefield, surprising 悠仁. 夏油 welcomes him but 脹相 finally recognizes the 呪詛師 as one of his three parents. There is 脹相's mother, the 呪霊 who got her pregnant, and the man who tormented 脹相's mother to create the 呪胎: 呪胎九相図 . 脹相 hated this person and now they're inhabiting 夏油傑's body. This person is none other than the evilest sorcerer in history, 加茂憲紀! 裏梅 stops 脹相 from attacking Pseudo-夏油. 脹相 yells at 加茂憲紀's identity in a rage, confusing パンダ, 悠仁, and the current Noritoshi. 歌姫 clears up that 脹相 is referring to the stain of the 加茂 Clan. 日下部 believes that it makes sense for him to be someone with absurd barrier techniques, cursed objects, and the ability to switch bodies. Pseudo-夏油 claims that 加茂憲紀 is just one of many names he's gone by. Irate that he was manipulated into attacking his little brother 悠仁, 脹相 rushes at Pseudo-夏油. 裏梅 abruptly cuts him off, sliding next to 夏油 and telling the "bottom-feeder" to step aside. 裏梅 tells 脹相 not to make them wait any longer but 脹相 replies for the 呪詛師 to get out of his way and repeats that he's 悠仁's older brother.

key_events_verified_phase7: 羂索がうずまきによる術式抽出を説明する
京都校の術師たちが羂索へ攻撃する
三輪が刀を振るう将来を懸けて抜刀する
日下部が三輪をうずまきから守る
脹相が羂索を加茂憲倫と見抜く
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
